meta_title: For Students: SaaS starter kit to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Students: SaaS Starter Kit to Build Your First App
content.seo_description: Break out of the tutorial loop. Use this SaaS starter kit with Antigravity and Claude Code to build professional-grade apps as a beginner student.
content.answer_block: Stop building static tutorials and start shipping real SaaS products. By leveraging a battle-tested SaaS starter kit, you bypass boilerplate fatigue. Using Antigravity to scaffold architecture and Claude Code to iterate features, you transform from a student learner into a professional builder capable of deploying production-ready software efficiently.
content.intro:
You have spent countless hours following YouTube tutorials, yet your portfolio remains a graveyard of 'To-Do' lists and generic calculators. The friction of setting up authentication, database schemas, and payment gateways is where most promising developers quit. You are not failing because you lack talent; you are failing because you lack a production-grade foundation.

This guide shifts your trajectory. We are moving beyond the tutorial loop by deploying a professional SaaS starter kit. Using the heavy-lifting capabilities of Antigravity and the autonomous coding power of Claude Code, you will stop writing boilerplate code and start architecting features that actually matter to users.

steps.title: Scaffold the Architecture
steps.description: Initialize your project with a robust starter kit to ensure your app is scalable from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, modular SaaS starter kit architecture using Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe. Include folder structure for API routes, middleware, and type definitions.

steps.title: Configure Identity Management
steps.description: Implement secure authentication so users can register and manage their accounts safely.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up Supabase Auth boilerplate. Include sign-up, sign-in, and password recovery pages with protected route middleware.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement auth flow with supabase-js'

steps.title: Build the Database Schema
steps.description: Define your data models to support user-specific content and subscription tiers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a SQL schema for a SaaS app with tables for profiles, subscriptions, and user-generated posts. Enforce RLS policies.

steps.title: Integrate Payments
steps.description: Connect Stripe to handle webhooks and subscription plans, turning your code into a business.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Stripe webhook handler to sync subscription status with the database users table.

steps.title: Deploy and Monitor
steps.description: Ship your application to Vercel and set up logging to observe real-world usage.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide a production-ready Vercel configuration and a checklist for pre-deployment environment variables.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'verify environment variables and deploy to vercel'

pro_tips: Always define your database schema before writing a single line of UI code to avoid 'schema drift'.
Use RLS (Row Level Security) immediately; never rely on frontend-only checks for data privacy.
Master the art of 'Atomic Commits' so you can roll back specific features without breaking the entire kit.
Prioritize mobile responsiveness early; 60% of your initial traffic will likely come from mobile devices.
Keep your environment variables strictly in a .env.local file and never commit them to your repository.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, begin adding one unique feature that solves a specific problem for your target niche to differentiate your portfolio from other students.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework, the tools, and the roadmap to bypass the beginner trap and build something that matters. Stop waiting for permission to be a developer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
